de.uka.ilkd.key.util.parsing

Class LocatableException

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.lang.Throwable
      • java.lang.Exception
        • java.lang.RuntimeException
          • de.uka.ilkd.key.util.parsing.LocatableException
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    HasLocation, java.io.Serializable

    public class LocatableException
extends java.lang.RuntimeException
implements HasLocation
    A simple checked exception which holds an location.
    See Also:
    Serialized Form

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      Location getLocation()
      This method can be used to obtain the Location (1-based line and column!) of the exception.

    • Method Detail

      • getLocation

        @Nullable
public Location getLocation()
                               throws java.net.MalformedURLException
        Description copied from interface: HasLocation
        This method can be used to obtain the Location (1-based line and column!) of the exception.
        Specified by:
        getLocation in interface HasLocation
        Returns:
        the location of the exception
        Throws:
        java.net.MalformedURLException - if the URL for the location can not be created
